elements.title: Iron Gate
elements.contents: ... that the Iron Gate (pictured), the only surviving ancient arch dam, still does its job?

elements.title: seat of government of Canada
elements.contents: ... that contrary to folklore, Queen Victoria did not choose Ottawa as the seat of government of Canada by putting her finger at random on a map?

elements.title: a bikeway
elements.contents: ... that a bikeway was criticized by motorists, a labor union, local vendors, and sex workers?

elements.title: Makmur Widodo
elements.contents: ... that the first thing Makmur Widodo did upon arriving in Ohio was to purchase a pair of jeans, a red shirt, and a cowboy hat?

elements.title: Wookiee
elements.contents: ... that a Wookiee holiday first depicted in the Star Wars Holiday Special was commemorated at Disney's theme parks 44 years later?

elements.title: Rome fell in 550
elements.contents: ... that Rome fell in 550 to besieging Gothic forces because some of its defenders had not been paid?

elements.title: Dakota station
elements.contents: ... that the artists behind Dakota station's public artwork intended to create a "visual time capsule"?

elements.title: Ruth Higgins
elements.contents: ... that Ruth Higgins will become the first woman to serve as Solicitor-General of Australia when her term begins in June 2026?

elements.title: a Chinese bootleg DVD of Revenge of the Sith
elements.contents: ... that, in a Chinese bootleg DVD of Revenge of the Sith, Anakin Skywalker and Obi-Wan Kenobi are part of the "Hopeless Situation Presbyterians"?
